item.name: Direwolf Whistle
item.description: A polished bone horn used to summon an Ixal-trained direwolf.

mount.name: Direwolf
mount.action: Summon forth your deadly direwolf, one of five pups found huddling together in the snow near the corpse of their slain mother.
mount.description: Mass cullings of the beasts during the Sixth Astral Era prompted naturalists to deem the species extinct. However, this claim was proved false when Ixali scouts discovered a lone pack roaming the sparsely inhabited mountains of Xelphatol.
mount.tooltip:
I lost two good men
to these wolves.
- Corentiaux the Colder
